evals.prompt: Use InsightDiff MCP to compare our staging homepage and production homepage at desktop size, save the report, and summarize only material visual regressions.
evals.expected_output: Uses take_screenshot twice with matching viewport/timing, compare_pages with Overall, saves report, summarizes regressions and report id.

evals.prompt: I have an uploaded private-page screenshot and a public production URL. Verify the screenshot against production with insightDiff and keep the response compact.
evals.expected_output: Uses uploaded image base64 path for the private-page screenshot, captures public URL, compare_pages with return_full_report false, no attempt to screenshot a private URL.

evals.prompt: Check whether the copy changed between these two pages. Use text-focused comparison and export the result as Markdown.
evals.expected_output: Captures both pages with extract_text true, compares with Text perspective, exports saved report as markdown.

evals.prompt: Find my latest MCP-created report, export it as standalone HTML, and do not delete anything.
evals.expected_output: Uses list_reports then get/export_report with html; does not call delete_report.
